input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.8.8.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.8.8.4
            TITLE: the impact attenuator data report when not using the standard impact attenuator must

            CONTENT:
            rule F.8.8.4: The Impact Attenuator Data Report when NOT using the Standard Impact Attenuator must
F.8.8.4 The Impact Attenuator Data Report when NOT using the Standard Impact Attenuator must 
include: 
a. Test data that proves that the Impact Attenuator Assembly meets the Functional 
Requirements  F.8.8.2  
b. Calculations showing how the reported absorbed energy and decelerations have been 
derived. 
c. A schematic of the test method. 
d. Photos of the attenuator, annotated with the height of the attenuator before and after 
testing.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 48 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: rule F.8.8.4: The Impact Attenuator Data Report when NOT using the Standard Impact Attenuator must F.8.8.4 The Impact Attenuator Data Report when NOT using the Standard Impact Attenuator must include: a. Test data that proves that the Impact Attenuator Assembly meets the Functional Requirements F.8.8.2 b. Calculations showing how the reported absorbed energy and decelerations have been derived. c. A schematic of the test method. d. Photos of the attenuator, annotated with the height of the attenuator before and after testing.
